en-US.description: Glide Beside helps parents and caregivers log and review day-to-day care context such as fluid intake, fluid output, wellness observations, gag episodes, weight entries, and summaries during a hospital stay. It is designed for caregiver organization and family handoff support. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, emergency support, or official medical records. Always follow the patient care team for medical decisions.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask glide beside for today's summary
Alexa, tell glide beside one hundred milliliters of water
en-US.name: Glide Beside
en-US.summary: Caregiver logging and handoff support for fluid, wellness, and daily care notes.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Development-stage endpoint: https://app.glidechart.com/api/alexa. Use reviewer/test account only after Clerk account-linking mapping is prepared. This skill is for caregiver logging and handoff support only; it does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, emergency support, or official care plans.
